---
title: Learn Diary
numbered: false
author: Yanxi ren
published: January 20th
---

## Introduction

![A beautiful photo](images/introduction.jpg){width="90%" fig-align="center"}

Hi! I am Yanxi, and my English name is Amelia. My undergraduate major is Landscape Gardening and my bachelor's degree is in Agriculture. During my undergraduate studies, I mainly studied courses related to landscape design and landscape plants.

After graduating from my undergraduate studies, I traveled to some places and began to think about how to more efficiently and comprehensively understand the city we are in, rather than staying at the local landscape design itself. 

Subsequently, my interest shifted towards the field of data, so I chose to pursue my Master's degree in Urban Space Science at the Centre for Advanced Spatial Analysis at University College London.

This website is my study log for the Remote Sensing Cities and Environment course in my second term, recording my weekly summary of learning content and personal reflections.
